context.summary: Proof 033 teacher seasoning lesson P033-FLOW-009 for FLOW.

task: SEASON mechanism lesson into the pond. Mechanism=FLOW. Domain=printer_spool. Observations=jobs originate at workstations; movement must use the spool route; the metered release limits passage; pages emerge in bursts. Causal chain=Supply appears before a route.; The route must carry the supply forward.; A local limiting point reduces passage.; Upstream accumulation rises while downstream arrival falls.. Consequence signature=arrival rate falls; waiting grows before limiter; far side receives less. Return bounded motifs and lineage only.
